title: adonis pilosa
intro: Adonis pilosa, also known as hairy adonis or white baneberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Adonis pilosa include its ability to lower fever, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate conditions such as rheumatism, bronchitis, and gastroenteritis. Herbal preparations of Adonis pilosa typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its health benefits.
